page.heading: Before you ship it
page.description: A quiet walkthrough of what you built. The palette in one place, every component wearing it, and anything the system noticed along the way.

scheme.title: Your system at a glance
scheme.description: The full set of colors behind your components — primitives with their shades, and the semantic roles they power.

gallery.title: How your system shows up
gallery.description: Every component you selected, rendered with the colors you chose. This is how the scheme reads once it's applied.

health.title: Before you ship it
health.description: A quick sanity check on balance, readability, and anything that might surprise you later.

distribution.title: Distribution
distribution.leadWarn: {{id}} carries {{pct}}% of references — your palette leans heavily on one family

readability.title: Readability
readability.empty: No text/surface pairs to grade yet.
